introSection: Wooden Warrior is a wooden roller coaster located at Quassy Amusement Park in Middlebury, Connecticut, USA. It opened on April 23, 2011, as a replacement to the park's aging Mad Mouse roller coaster, which was built in 1966 and closed in 2010.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Wooden Warrior was originally planned to open in 2010. However, construction was delayed due to complaints from a nearby homeowner.

The attraction opened on April 23, 2011.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The ride uses Timberliner trains manufactured by Gravitykraft Corporation.

fullText:
Wooden Warrior is a wooden roller coaster located at Quassy Amusement Park in Middlebury, Connecticut, USA. It opened on April 23, 2011, as a replacement to the park's aging Mad Mouse roller coaster, which was built in 1966 and closed in 2010.

Wooden Warrior was originally planned to open in 2010. However, construction was delayed due to complaints from a nearby homeowner.

The attraction opened on April 23, 2011.



The ride uses Timberliner trains manufactured by Gravitykraft Corporation.
